rounds: Lavendra with the necklace, black bag, and Noskin loafers — full picture, people who know him — that one goes to Matt, no question. Pink toes held all week and the thong at Balmoral was an active choice, not an accident. But the poncho is doing double duty as a security blanket — brave choice made, exposure quietly avoided. And the wetsuit moment with the swim group? Joy police showed up and he felt it. Named it though, which is the whole game.
pattern: They're loudest with his people — strangers barely register anymore, but the swim group and the social circle are still the frontier.
focus: Look at one daily routine this week and ask — is this what I'd choose, or just what I do?
